title: Fancy Toasts | Better Advancements
description: Overhauls the old advancement toast system
body:
## [🍞] There is a reason you're here And the reason is, well, either curiosity or these annoying, plain, and boring **advancement toasts!** They don't feel like advancements at all. Just some useless notifications during the game! ~~Not like this mod will make them any more usefull, though~~ I won't say vanilla toasts are that bad. But seriously, it's been quite some time **(13 YEARS)** since their first release, and they have never been updated ## [👀] Little Showcases



## [✨] Custom Textures It isn't just built-in customization, but it also has **customiziable** textures! You can add your own textures, drawn by your hands! You can include them in **modpacks**, **share with friends**, **or just use them on your own**! If you are interested in doing your own textures or downloading someone's textures, check out [this guide](https://github.com/Bivrik/FancyToasts/wiki/Custom-Texture-Guide)! Perfect for creating modpacks with custom textures, which would enhance immersion! ## [😮] Fancy Config Screen There are **2 main config screens**, each one responding for their own config file. The first screen is about **customization**! You can change animation, texture (built-in or custom) and sounds as well! It has сonveniently placed search box for list of avaiable options and little list for infomration about choosen option! The second screen is more **techincal one**. You can change volumes, turn on and off some other settings and etc. Was recently added in **v1.4.1**, so there might be some bugs



## [💾] Built-in Textures This mod actually makes a **difference** between Tasks, Goals, and Challenges. They are welcomed with different sounds and textures, depending on an advancement type. But c'mon guys, it would be still BORING. So it also adds new whole **eight texture types** by default! * **Vanilla Style** > * **OG** > * **Nature** > * **Modern** > * **Terracraft** (Inspired by Terraria) > * **Steamy** (Inspired by Steam achivements) > * **Landspaper** > * **Neon** > Every of them have custom background and three banner and icons for different advancement types. And obviously there will be even more in the future ## [👾] Animations Someone would say that one new animation type would be already enough! It already makes it so alive… and I agree! But… I want to give you more customization. So there is not one, not two, but **four animation types!** Yeah, now it actually sounds kinda… cool. It also has different moods into them as well * **Standard** > Calm and steady, nothing too energetic. Stable and confident * **Playful** > Energetic, jiggly, and, well… playful! More naive and bouncy * **Quirky** > Well.. quite unusual among previous two. Has different layout and more energetic * **Old-Like** > Old-school. The good old sliding from right to left. But with a trick



## [🧡] Support and Additional Info If you like my mod, you play it, and you want to see future development, hear my thoughts, obtain new versions a bit quicker or even see devlogs, then visit my [Boosty](https://boosty.to/bivrik) and support me, whether it's a simple follow, one-time donation or subscription. I will be very grateful! 🤗 ## [🧩] Dependencies ### Compatibilities: * Supports other **mods'** and **datapacks'** advancements as well * Supports [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade), so its display hides, when advancement toast shows * Forge and NeoForge versions connected to their own config buttons in mod menu * Fabric version supports [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for easier in-game configuration ### Incompatibilities: * Does **not** work with [Toast Control](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/toast-control) mod (found by VaporeonScripts) * Breaks with [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations) mod before **v1.4.2**. To **fix**, change BadOptimizations' config variable "enable_toast_optimizations" to "false" (found by TCK-MODDER and VinnyStalck) ## [🌍] Languages Mod supports **six different languages** for its own config screen! Half of them were made with translator, so mistakes are not impossible * **English** (en_us) * **Russian** (ru_ru) * **Spanish** (es_es) _by translator_ * **German** (de_de) _by translator_ * **Portuguese** (pt_br) _by translator_ * **Chinese** (simplified) (zh_cn) by Gao Xinyang * **Chinese** (traditional) (zh_tw) by ChaTian * **Japanese** (ja_jp) by PExPE3 ## [📝] Plans Stay tuned for more! Because there will be more animations, more textures, more versions and loaders, more more, more erom, uhm... You got the point! And also (probably) more dependencies for specific mods! ## [🔎] Versions Explained It's a bit quirky but it works: X.Y.Z.P, where X stands for major updates, Y stands for minor changes, Z stands for bug fixes. And in the end P which stands for patch, therefore loader/version specific fixes when necessary. Examples: * 1.3.5: Z update (bug fix) * 1.4.0: Y update (New texture/setting, tweaks) * 1.4.0.1: P update (bug fix for 1.21.1 fabric version) * 2.0.0: X update (custom texture support, new big feature) Check my [github changelog](https://github.com/Bivrik/FancyToasts?tab=readme-ov-file#changelog-) if you are curious about old/future versions and new changes!
